reason: Q4 quantization produces score drifts of 0.05-0.55 on the validation set (max diff 5.47e-1, mean 2.18e-1), flipping top-10 ranking positions 1-2 and 4-5. Cross-encoder classifier heads are quantization-sensitive because the calibrated yes-token logit amplifies any perturbation. Confirmed by research agents: bgconley/qwen3-reranker-multi, jundot/omlx, and multiple 2025-2026 papers all explicitly defer Q4 for reranker weights.
recommendation: Use bf16 baseline or Q8; avoid Q4 for reranker weights. Mixed-precision (bf16 lm_head + embed_tokens, Q8 for body) is a future option via mlx_lm quant_predicate.
